name: Bridge the Band of Agents hackathon gaps: make Band the real coordination layer for 3+ agents, route models across AI/ML API + Featherless with OpenAI fallback, turn the sequential chain into a plan->execute->review loop, and surface a regulated-track audit trail. — plan
description: Living spec + tracking board for the Bridge the Band of Agents hackathon gaps: make Band the real coordination layer for 3+ agents, route models across AI/ML API + Featherless with OpenAI fallback, turn the sequential chain into a plan->execute->review loop, and surface a regulated-track audit trail. plan. index.html is the multi-tab conceptual walkthrough; board.html is the operational dashboard.

dataSources._comment: Optional external data sources keyed by name. The artifact loads them at runtime via the AppBridge `sources` API. When absent or unreachable (e.g. standalone in a browser), the artifact falls through to the mock-data block declared in `fallback.dataTag`. Example: `"board": { "type": "file", "path": "./data/board.json", "refresh": { "mode": "manual" } }`.
